The post Machine Gun Kelly Fan Falls Through Opening In Stage appeared first on Stereogum.
full_text:
Being an MGK fan is one long humiliation ritual. On Thursday (March 5), the rapper-turned-rocker performed at London's O2 Arena and invited a bunch of audience members onstage during his song "bloody valentine." An especially unfortunate one fell right through an opening in the uniquely (dangerously!) designed stage.

A video of the incident inevitably went viral. After the fan took the intense tumble, MGK said, "Oh my god, hold up." He didn't hold up, but he altered the lyrics as he continued to sing: "I can't hide/ I really hope that you're fine/ I'd give everything up tonight/ If I could just… are you okay?"

She confirmed she was okay and got back onstage, and MGK even gave her his hat. In other MGK news, he is not back together with Megan Fox.
